        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_UB_NDC_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.NDCUB File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDCUB"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB_NDC_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.UB_NDC_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_NDC_CLAIM_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.NDC File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDC"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NDC_CLAIM_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NDC_CLAIM_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests ADO.ADJUST.CLAIM File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.ADJS"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
          quote_char: "\x06"           #change this if § is present in data
          delimiter_value: "\x0B"   #change this if delimiter is present in data
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
#Azure VAULT URL specific to the environment
azure_vault:
  url: "https://kv-c-d-shrd-doh-01.vault.azure.net/"
  keys: # fetches key vaults upfront so that they cna be referenced in the config values section directly using $KEY$ notation.
    - CS-HTTP-DOWNLOAD-CMS-GOV
    - CS-SQL-SYSDOH
    - CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYS-WLP-CLEMSON
    - CS-SFTP-MMIS
    - CS-FS-945Form
    - CS-Sharepoint
    - CS-SMTP
    - CS-SHAREPOINT-UPLOAD-DTO
    - CS-SFTP-ONBASE
    - CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS
    - CS-DTO-AD
    - CS-ONBASE-CLOUD
    - CS-FILESHARE-ONBASE
    - CS-SQL-SYS-PHOENIX
    - CS-SFTP-TEFRA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA
    - CS-SFTP-AZURE-QA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH

common_tools:
  oracle_instant_client:
    folder_location: "E:/Installs/instantclient_23_7"
  bcp_client:
    exe_location: "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/bcp.exe"
  open_ssl:
    exe_location: "E:/Installs/OpenSSL-Win64/bin/openssl.exe"

etl_temp_share:
  folder_location: "E:/DOH_Shared/"  # File share accessible by SQL Server
  logs_location: "E:/Logs/"

operations_recipients: &operations_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

wlp_eligibility_recipients: &wlp_eligibility_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

email:
  sender: &sender dev_doh@scdhhs.gov
  recipients:
    - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov
#    - NagaSravanthi.Nidumolu@scdhhs.gov
#    - Venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#    - chakradhar.kaitepalli@scdhhs.gov
  env: DEV

# Source.connection.type should be one of ORACLE or SQLSERVER

jobs:
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(Applications, CuramAssessmentQueues, Form1716, FormLTC, ReturnedMail, Reviews,TrailingDocuments) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Applications.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Applications
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CuramAssessmentQueues.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CuramAssessmentQueues
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Form1716.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Form1716
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/FormLTC.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.FormLTC
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/ReturnedMail.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReturnedMail
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Reviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Reviews
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/TrailingDocuments.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TrailingDocuments
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/users.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Users
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_OnBase
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  #WLP Ingest from OnBase

  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(WLPConfigTeams,WLPConfigWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequences,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces,WLPConfigWorkspaces,WLPReassignmentsByCase) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$     #CS-ONBASE-CLOUD, CS-ONBASE-ClOUD-STAGING
        dbname: OnBase  #OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth:  WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigTeams.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigTeams
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequences.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequences
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPReassignmentsByCase.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReassignmentsbyCase
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPTasksNotFinished.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPTasksNotFinished
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_COA_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables specific to Case Ownership Assignments workflow(CaseOwnership, CaseOwnershipOrphans) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_WLP database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnership.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnership
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnershipOrphans.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnershipOrphans
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_1
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests CaseParticipantRoles table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB using multi-threading."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.CaseParticipantRoles.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseParticipantRoles
          description: 5.2 million records table need to be ingested in multi-threaded way

    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_2
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingWorkflowTasks table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_3
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests multiple tables (Curam_Member_DOD, PendingApps, PendingAppsSubmitFailed, TimersCGIS, TimersHCR, TimersTD, WorkflowTaskTypes) from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.Curam_Member_DOD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Curam_Member_DOD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingApps.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingApps
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersCGIS.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersCGIS
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersHCR.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersHCR
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersTD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersTD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 15000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_4
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingReviews table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingReviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingReviews
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 150000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: EXTRACT_ELIGIBILITY_CSV_REPORT
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts CTI_DEMO_TARGET table from SSA_Demo SQL Server DB to a CSV file on a network share."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: SSA_Demo
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: //$CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH$/WLP/POC
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: CTI_DEMO_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_PROVIDER
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests MMIS provider file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.PROVIDER.FILE"
          cobol_copybook: "MMIS-PROVIDER.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.MMIS_PROVIDER
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_NPI_JUNCTION
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests NPI junction file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.JUNCT.XWALK"
          cobol_copybook: "NPI-JUNCTION.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NPI_JUNCTION
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestSFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_RSP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests BNET.RSP.FILE from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using JSON configs."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "1048576"
          json_config: "RSP.json"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "BNET.RSP.FILE"
          target_table_name: "RSRI_RSP_INFOMTN"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_ELIG
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests BNET.ELIG.FILE from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using JSON configs."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          json_config: "ELIG.json"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "BNET.ELIG.FILE"
          target_table_name: "RECIPIENT"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestFTS  Source DB MedOps.dbo.945_FORM
  - job_name: INGEST_DHECFILE_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DHEC death master file from file share to A4P_Operations SQL Server DB using JSON config."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: FTS
      connection:
        path: $CS-FS-945Form$
        domain: your_domain
        user: share_user
        password: share_password
        file_extension: "dth"
        json_config: "DHECConfig.json"
        table_name: "DeathMasterFile_DHEC"
        mode: append
        filter_column: "FileDate"
      options:
        batch_size: 10000
        overwrite: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestDSSFTP - Foster Care Services
  - job_name: INGEST_DSSFILE_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests Current_Foster_Care_Services CSV from DSS SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP_EXCEL
      connection:
        url: $CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "/DSStoDHHS"
          file_extension: ""
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/ftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "Current_Foster_Care_Services_*.csv"
          target_table_name: "FC_CURRENT"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestSHAREPOINT SharePoint to MSSQL ETL process
  - job_name: INGEST_945FORM_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests 945 Letter Requests Excel files from SharePoint to A4P_Operations SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SHAREPOINT
      connection:
        url: $CS-Sharepoint$
      files:
        - drive_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/drives/b!iXumoksdiEaUa_1_mfhcHXm4U0fgyrhHvqWy62cbippc-O0NWC_rRZA40Zs_RrGB/root:"
          file_extension: ""
          folder_path: "/945 Letter Requests"
          filename_pattern: "945*.xlsx"
          target_table_name: "945_FORM"
          mode: append
          filter_column: "SqlBulkCopy_TS"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true
      retries: 1
      sleep_time: 60

  # SOR Stored procedure execution
  - job_name: SOR_WLP_CREATE_CO
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedure dbo.spWMRequestBatchCreate for Case Ownership view creation in A4P_WLP."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spWMRequestBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WM
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
          include_response_in_email: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      send_sms: true


  - job_name: SOR_WLP_OUTBOUND
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spBatchCreate, dbo.spBatchSend)  for WLP report generation and outbound file creation, including CSV export to SFTP."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchSend
          consider_input_from_previous_sp: true
          params: {
            "BatchId": "0"  # Index position of the previous stored procedure returned result set
          }

# ingest WLP Response Files SFTP:
  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_INBOUND_FROM_SFTP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests WLP_DTO response files from SFTP to A4P_WLP SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "WLP_DTO.*.txt.*"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/DOWNLOAD"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "WLPBatchesInbound"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: "|"                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: false
          expected_file_count: 5
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_WLP  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_1_EXTRACT_OBJECT_IDS  #Step 1 - Extract TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts distinct TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file for further processing. Target: CSV file."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: select distinct t.TaskObjectId from dbo.WLPTasks t left join dbo.WLPStatuses s on t.[Status] = s.[StatusName] where isnull(s.[StatusFinal], 0) = 0
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds"
        is_local_download_path: true  # There is an upload to a network share with SMB protocol. Which is not needed for local paths.
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: TaskObjectId_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_2_INGEST_LATEST_STATUS #Step 2, got this OnBase Query from meeting recordings
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests latest status for TaskObjectIds from OnBase_Prod to WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) in A4P_WLP."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON$
        dbname: OnBase_Prod
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: BASIC_AUTH
      tables:
          - query: "select t.objectId TaskOBjectId, wl.attr1652 Worklane, t.attr1687 CaseId, t.attr1654 [Status] 
                    from hsi.rmobjectinstance1057 t
                    left join hsi.rmobjectinstance1053 wl on t.fk1688  = wl.objectid and wl.activestatus = 0 
                    where t.activestatus = 0
                    and t.objectid in (?)"
            consider_input_from_local_csv: true
            local_csv_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds/TaskObjectId_Extract_*.csv"
            target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses
            batch_size: 50
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_3_UPDATE_LATEST_STATUS # Step 3, update the WLPSystemTaskStatuses table with latest status
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedure dbo.spGetWLPSystemTaskStatuses, dbo.spBatchCompleteTasksDeliverOnceStatuses to update WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) with the latest status."

    destination:

      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

# IPP Jobs - Step 1 - Ingesting the Source Data from SFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_LLR_SOURCE_CSV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests LLR files from SFTP to A4P_LLR SQL Server DB."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA$  #DEV SFTP # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/prod"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "LLR_PY"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_LLR  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      send_email_per_file: false
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

# Step 2 - Generating the IPP File to deliver to HHCD103
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_LLR_PFF_FILE
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS) for IPP PFF outbound file creation, including file export to SFTP."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
              remote_dir: "//HHCD103"
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads/mainframe"
              is_mainframe_pff_file_type: true
            options:
              record_format: fb
              logical_record_length: 191
              format: csv
              delimiter: ""
              header: false
              filename_format: "CDIR.NEWPRV"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
              fail_on_zero_records: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

#Step 3: Update Timestamp for delivered records in Audit Table
  - job_name: UPDATE_LLR_TIMESTAMP
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures to update time stamp "
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spSetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS_Delivered
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000

#Step 4: Generating Pharmacy Reports and devliver to Sharepoint
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_PHARMACY_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates LLR Reports need to be sent to Pharmacy Team"
    module_name: IPP
    reports:
      - report_name: Pharmacy Report
        output_folder: E:/DOH_Shared/Reports/IPP_Pharmacy
        queries:
          LLR Report: IPP_LLR.sql
          Match Report: IPP_MatchResult.sql
    module_type: IPP
    source:
      type: REPORT
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_LLR"
        file_format: "xlsx"
        batch_size: 10000
        per_sheet_grid: true  # or false true
        include_counts_in_grid: true
        reporting_query_path: reporting_queries/IPP
        grid_columns:
          - reportName
          - sheetName
          - count
          - sharepointWebUrl
          #- sharepointFolder
    destination:
      type: sharepoint
      connection:
        upload_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/drives/b!gLAXAgcDQUq-0-LKb3WexnWd2RDitqpPt4NdEyKarkbXEpaU82wCQJ1WcwWpg5yg/root:"
        folder_path: /
    options:
      email:
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIM_LINK_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.CLR File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLR"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/CLAIM_LINK_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.CLAIM_LINK_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_UB_NDC_REC

          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDCUB"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB_NDC_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.UB_NDC_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_NDC_CLAIM_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.NDC File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDC"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NDC_CLAIM_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NDC_CLAIM_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests ADO.ADJUST.CLAIM File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.ADJS"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM

          delimiter_value: "\x0B"   #change this if delimiter is present in data
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
# inside a job's source.files item
- remote_path: "//HHCD103"
  filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
  local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
  delete_after_process: false
  mode: "truncate"            # or "append" or "upsert" (per route if you need later)
  is_bcp_load_needed: true    # reuse existing flag
  combined_file_routing:
    doc_type:
      position: 17            # 1-based or 0-based; pick one convention and stick to it
    routes:
      - when:
          doc_type_in: ["U"]
        xml: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"

      - when:
          doc_type_in: ["B"]
        xml: "./CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"
      # ...

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- filename_pattern: "DSU0059.VOIDS"
  combined_file_routing:

      position: 39

      target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"

          tail_ind_is_true: true
        xml: "./CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"

      - when: { doc_type_in: ["Y","Z"], tail_ind_is_true: true }

        target_table_name: "dbo.UZD_DAILY_TAIL"

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- remote_path: "//HHCD103"
  filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
  buffer_size: "524288"
  local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
  delete_after_process: false

  # required for performance with large combined files
  is_bcp_load_needed: true
  mode: "truncate"

  combined_file_routing:
    doc_type:
      position: 17   # 1-based
    routes:
      - doc_type: "U"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"

      - doc_type: "B"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"

      - doc_type: "A"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"

      - doc_type: "Y"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"

      - doc_type: "G"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"

      - doc_type: "D"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:

  is_bcp_load_needed: true

    default:

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- filename_pattern: "CLM2200B.ALLCLMS.D*.T*"
  is_bcp_load_needed: true
  mode: "truncate"
  combined_file_routing:
    doc_type:
      position: 310
    tail_ind:
      position: 332
      true_values: ["1"]
    routes:
      - doc_type: "U"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY"
      - doc_type: "J"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/BID_BUY_IN_DAILY2.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.BID_BUY_IN_DAILY_2"
      - doc_type: "B"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/DND_DENTAL_DAILY2.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.DND_DENTAL_DAILY_2"
      - doc_type: "A"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/HID_HIC_DAILY2.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.HID_HIC_DAILY_2"
      - doc_type: "G"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY2.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY_2"
      - doc_type: "D"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY2.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY_2"
      - doc_type: "Y"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB04_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_DAILY_CLAIM"
      - doc_type: "Z"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM"

      # doc_type in (Y,Z) AND tail=1
      - doc_type: "YZ"
        tail_ind: "1"
        cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UZD_DAILY_TAIL.xml"
        target_table_name: "dbo.UZD_DAILY_TAIL"

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
routes:
  # Most specific first (doc_type + tail_ind both present)
  - doc_type: "YZ"        # Y or Z
    tail_ind: "1"
    cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UZD_DAILY_TAIL.xml"
    target_table_name: "dbo.UZD_DAILY_TAIL"

  # Less specific after (doc_type only)
  - doc_type: "U"
    cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY.xml"
    target_table_name: "dbo.ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY"

  - doc_type: "Y"
    cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB04_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
    target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_DAILY_CLAIM"

  - doc_type: "Z"
    cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
    target_table_name: "dbo.UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM"

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- job_name: INGEST_ALL_CLAIMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.CLMS claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 17, loads into 6 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false

          combined_file_routing:
            doc_type:
              position: 17        # 1-based position in the fixed-width mainframe record
            routes:
              # Most specific routes first (if any route has doc_type + tail_ind in future)
              # For CLMS - doc_type only routing, order still matters for clarity
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"

              - doc_type: "B"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"

              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"

              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"

              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"

              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"

    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

reference.name: config-dev.yaml
reference.text:
#Azure VAULT URL specific to the environment
azure_vault:
  url: "https://kv-c-d-shrd-doh-01.vault.azure.net/"
  keys: # fetches key vaults upfront so that they cna be referenced in the config values section directly using $KEY$ notation.
    - CS-HTTP-DOWNLOAD-CMS-GOV
    - CS-SQL-SYSDOH
    - CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYS-WLP-CLEMSON
    - CS-SFTP-MMIS
    - CS-FS-945Form
    - CS-Sharepoint
    - CS-SMTP
    - CS-SHAREPOINT-UPLOAD-DTO
    - CS-SFTP-ONBASE
    - CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS
    - CS-DTO-AD
    - CS-ONBASE-CLOUD
    - CS-FILESHARE-ONBASE
    - CS-SQL-SYS-PHOENIX
    - CS-SFTP-TEFRA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA
    - CS-SFTP-AZURE-QA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH

common_tools:
  oracle_instant_client:
    folder_location: "E:/Installs/instantclient_23_7"
  bcp_client:
    exe_location: "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/bcp.exe"
  open_ssl:
    exe_location: "E:/Installs/OpenSSL-Win64/bin/openssl.exe"

etl_temp_share:
  folder_location: "E:/DOH_Shared/"  # File share accessible by SQL Server
  logs_location: "E:/Logs/"

operations_recipients: &operations_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

wlp_eligibility_recipients: &wlp_eligibility_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

email:
  sender: &sender dev_doh@scdhhs.gov
  recipients:
    - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov
#    - NagaSravanthi.Nidumolu@scdhhs.gov
#    - Venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#    - chakradhar.kaitepalli@scdhhs.gov
  env: DEV

# Source.connection.type should be one of ORACLE or SQLSERVER

jobs:
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(Applications, CuramAssessmentQueues, Form1716, FormLTC, ReturnedMail, Reviews,TrailingDocuments) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Applications.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Applications
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CuramAssessmentQueues.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CuramAssessmentQueues
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Form1716.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Form1716
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/FormLTC.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.FormLTC
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/ReturnedMail.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReturnedMail
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Reviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Reviews
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/TrailingDocuments.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TrailingDocuments
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/users.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Users
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_OnBase
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  #WLP Ingest from OnBase

  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(WLPConfigTeams,WLPConfigWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequences,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces,WLPConfigWorkspaces,WLPReassignmentsByCase) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$     #CS-ONBASE-CLOUD, CS-ONBASE-ClOUD-STAGING
        dbname: OnBase  #OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth:  WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigTeams.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigTeams
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequences.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequences
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPReassignmentsByCase.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReassignmentsbyCase
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPTasksNotFinished.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPTasksNotFinished
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo

    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spWMRequestBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WM
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
          include_response_in_email: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      send_sms: true


  - job_name: SOR_WLP_OUTBOUND
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spBatchCreate, dbo.spBatchSend)  for WLP report generation and outbound file creation, including CSV export to SFTP."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchSend
          consider_input_from_previous_sp: true
          params: {
            "BatchId": "0"  # Index position of the previous stored procedure returned result set
          }
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads"
              remote_dir: "/UPLOAD"
            options:
              format: csv
              delimiter: "|"
              header: true
              filename_format: "ROW[0].csv"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
#            type: network_share
#            connection:
#              path: //$CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH$/WLP/POC/
#              domain: your_domain
#              user: share_user
#              password: share_password
#            options:
#              format: csv
#              delimiter: "|"
#              header: true
#              filename_format: "ROW[0].csv"
#              batch_size: 10000
#              overwrite: true


    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

# ingest WLP Response Files SFTP:
  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_INBOUND_FROM_SFTP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests WLP_DTO response files from SFTP to A4P_WLP SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "WLP_DTO.*.txt.*"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/DOWNLOAD"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "WLPBatchesInbound"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: "|"                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: false
          expected_file_count: 5
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_WLP  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_1_EXTRACT_OBJECT_IDS  #Step 1 - Extract TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts distinct TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file for further processing. Target: CSV file."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: select distinct t.TaskObjectId from dbo.WLPTasks t left join dbo.WLPStatuses s on t.[Status] = s.[StatusName] where isnull(s.[StatusFinal], 0) = 0
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds"
        is_local_download_path: true  # There is an upload to a network share with SMB protocol. Which is not needed for local paths.
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: TaskObjectId_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_2_INGEST_LATEST_STATUS #Step 2, got this OnBase Query from meeting recordings
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests latest status for TaskObjectIds from OnBase_Prod to WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) in A4P_WLP."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON$
        dbname: OnBase_Prod
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: BASIC_AUTH
      tables:
          - query: "select t.objectId TaskOBjectId, wl.attr1652 Worklane, t.attr1687 CaseId, t.attr1654 [Status] 
                    from hsi.rmobjectinstance1057 t
                    left join hsi.rmobjectinstance1053 wl on t.fk1688  = wl.objectid and wl.activestatus = 0 
                    where t.activestatus = 0
                    and t.objectid in (?)"
            consider_input_from_local_csv: true
            local_csv_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds/TaskObjectId_Extract_*.csv"
            target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses
            batch_size: 50
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_3_UPDATE_LATEST_STATUS # Step 3, update the WLPSystemTaskStatuses table with latest status
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedure dbo.spGetWLPSystemTaskStatuses, dbo.spBatchCompleteTasksDeliverOnceStatuses to update WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) with the latest status."
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetWLPSystemTaskStatuses
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "5:45 AM"  # Before the Main SOR Case Ownership creation
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchCompleteTasksDeliverOnceStatuses
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "5:45 AM"  # Before the Main SOR Case Ownership creation
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

  - job_name: INGEST_SSA_DEMO
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests SSA Demo."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: SSA_Demo
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
          - query: "CREATE TABLE [dbo].[WorkflowTaskTypes_Source](
                      [TASKTYPE] [varchar](25) NOT NULL,

    source:

      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"

          is_custom_file_name_filter: true

#          delimiter_value = "\x1F"   #change this if delimiter is present in data

    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

    description: "Ingests MMIS-TPL files from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybooks generated XML layouts."
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/tpl"
          filename_pattern: "POLICY.RECIP.FILE"
          cobol_copybook: "TPL/POLICY.RCIPIENT.RETSUB.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.POLICY_RECIPIENT
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

# IPP Jobs - Step 1 - Ingesting the Source Data from SFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_LLR_SOURCE_CSV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests LLR files from SFTP to A4P_LLR SQL Server DB."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA$  #DEV SFTP # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/prod"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "LLR_PY"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_LLR  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      send_email_per_file: false
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

# Step 2 - Generating the IPP File to deliver to HHCD103
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_LLR_PFF_FILE
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS) for IPP PFF outbound file creation, including file export to SFTP."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
              remote_dir: "//HHCD103"
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads/mainframe"
              is_mainframe_pff_file_type: true
            options:
              record_format: fb
              logical_record_length: 191
              format: csv
              delimiter: ""
              header: false
              filename_format: "CDIR.NEWPRV"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
              fail_on_zero_records: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

#Step 3: Update Timestamp for delivered records in Audit Table
  - job_name: UPDATE_LLR_TIMESTAMP
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures to update time stamp "
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spSetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS_Delivered
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000

#Step 4: Generating Pharmacy Reports and devliver to Sharepoint
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_PHARMACY_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates LLR Reports need to be sent to Pharmacy Team"
    module_name: IPP
    reports:
      - report_name: Pharmacy Report
        output_folder: E:/DOH_Shared/Reports/IPP_Pharmacy
        queries:
          LLR Report: IPP_LLR.sql
          Match Report: IPP_MatchResult.sql
    module_type: IPP
    source:
      type: REPORT
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_LLR"
        file_format: "xlsx"
        batch_size: 10000
        per_sheet_grid: true  # or false true
        include_counts_in_grid: true
        reporting_query_path: reporting_queries/IPP
        grid_columns:
          - reportName
          - sheetName
          - count
          - sharepointWebUrl
          #- sharepointFolder
    destination:
      type: sharepoint
      connection:
        upload_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/drives/b!gLAXAgcDQUq-0-LKb3WexnWd2RDitqpPt4NdEyKarkbXEpaU82wCQJ1WcwWpg5yg/root:"
        folder_path: /
    options:
      email:
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  #Ad users Config
  - job_name: INGEST_ADGROUPS_MEMBERS_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests AD Group Members data from Active Directory to A4P_Employee SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: ACTIVE_DIRECTORY
      entity: member
      connection:
        url: $CS-DTO-AD$
    destination:
      type: SQL_SERVER
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: A4P_Employee
        table: dbo.GroupMembers
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

  #Ad users Config
  - job_name: INGEST_ADGROUPS_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests AD Groups data from Active Directory to A4P_Employee SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: ACTIVE_DIRECTORY
      entity: groups
      connection:
        url: $CS-DTO-AD$
    destination:
      type: SQL_SERVER
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: A4P_Employee
        table: dbo.Groups
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

  #Ad users Config
  - job_name: INGEST_ADUSERS_COA_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests AD users data from Active Directory to A4P_Employee SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: ACTIVE_DIRECTORY
      connection:
        url: $CS-DTO-AD$
    destination:
      type: SQL_SERVER
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: A4P_Employee
        table: dbo.Users
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

  - job_name: MONITOR_SFTP_FILE_SCLLR
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Checks for the Remote file at SFTP location and sends an email notification if found"
    skip_generic_outcome_in_email : True
    source:
      type: SFTP_READ
      skip_failure_email: True
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD$
      files:
        - remote_path: "/prod"
          file_extension: ""
          file_name_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"
          delete_after_process: False
          check_for_file_without_downloading: True
    destination:
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_TEST_DATA_MSSQL_TO_MSSQL
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests test data from mock_table_source in DOH_Operations to mock_table_destination in DOH_Operations for Unit Testing"
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DOH_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: "SELECT *  FROM dbo.mock_table_source"
          target_table_name: dbo.mock_table_destination
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DOH_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH


  - job_name: INGEST_TEST_DATA_MYSQL_TO_SQL
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "to unit test transform_dataframe method for mysql to sql transfromations"
    destination:
      type: SQLSERVER
      table: dbo.mock_table_source
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DOH_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH

  - job_name: INGEST_TEST_DATA_ORACLE_TO_SQL
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "to unit test transform_dataframe method for oracle to sql transfromations"
    destination:
      type: database
      table: dbo.mock_table_source
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DOH_Operations
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH

  - job_name: EXTRACT_AD_GROUPS_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates a Report of DOH_AD_Groups by querying on A4P_Employee"
    source:
      type: REPORT_TABULAR
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_Employee"
        queries:
          AD Groups Report: reporting_queries/AD_GROUPS/DOH_AD_GROUPS.sql
    destination:
      type: SMTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SMTP$
    options:
      email:
        subject: DOH AD Groups Report
        body: Monthly DOH AD Groups Summary.
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
         - *operations_recipients

  - job_name: EXTRACT_PROV_CHECKS_NEW_TASKS_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates New Tasks Report for PROVIDER CHECKS by querying on A4P_ProviderManagement"
    source:
      type: REPORT_TABULAR
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_ProviderManagement"
        queries:
          Provider Checks SP Report: reporting_queries/Provider_Checks/Process_Tasks.sql
          Provider Checks Report: reporting_queries/Provider_Checks/New_Tasks.sql
    destination:
      type: SMTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SMTP$
    options:
      email:
        subject: "[Secure] Provider Checks New Tasks Report"
        body: "Completed Processing Provider Automated Checks: New Tasks."
        show_counts: true
        count_label: "No. of Tasks reported"
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
         - *operations_recipients

  - job_name: EXTRACT_PROV_CHECKS_LATE_TASKS_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates Late Tasks Report for PROVIDER CHECKS by querying on A4P_ProviderManagement"
    source:
      type: REPORT_TABULAR
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_ProviderManagement"
        queries:
          Provider Checks Report: reporting_queries/Provider_Checks/Late_Tasks.sql
    destination:
      type: SMTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SMTP$
    options:
      email:
        subject: "[Secure] Provider Checks Late Tasks Report"
        body: "Completed Processing Provider Automated Checks: Late Tasks."
        show_counts: true
        count_label: "No. of Late Tasks reported"
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
         - *operations_recipients


  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.CLMS claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 17, loads into 6 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            doc_type:
              position: 17
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # For CLMS - doc_type only routing, order still matters for clarity
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "B"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000




  - job_name: INGEST_UBREV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.UBREV File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.UBREV"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UBREV.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.UBREV
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_RCOUP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.RCOUP File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.RCOUP"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/RCOUP.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.RCOUP
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIM_LINK_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.CLR File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLR"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/CLAIM_LINK_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.CLAIM_LINK_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_UB_NDC_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.NDCUB File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDCUB"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/UB_NDC_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.UB_NDC_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_NDC_CLAIM_REC
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests DSU0059.NDC File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.NDC"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/NDC_CLAIM_REC.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NDC_CLAIM_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests ADO.ADJUST.CLAIM File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.ADJS"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
          quote_char: "\x06"           #change this if § is present in data
          delimiter_value: "\x0B"   #change this if delimiter is present in data
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
#Azure VAULT URL specific to the environment
azure_vault:
  url: "https://kv-c-d-shrd-doh-01.vault.azure.net/"
  keys: # fetches key vaults upfront so that they cna be referenced in the config values section directly using $KEY$ notation.
    - CS-HTTP-DOWNLOAD-CMS-GOV
    - CS-SQL-SYSDOH
    - CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYS-WLP-CLEMSON
    - CS-SFTP-MMIS
    - CS-FS-945Form
    - CS-Sharepoint
    - CS-SMTP
    - CS-SHAREPOINT-UPLOAD-DTO
    - CS-SFTP-ONBASE
    - CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS
    - CS-DTO-AD
    - CS-ONBASE-CLOUD
    - CS-FILESHARE-ONBASE
    - CS-SQL-SYS-PHOENIX
    - CS-SFTP-TEFRA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA
    - CS-SFTP-AZURE-QA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH

common_tools:
  oracle_instant_client:
    folder_location: "E:/Installs/instantclient_23_7"
  bcp_client:
    exe_location: "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/bcp.exe"
  open_ssl:
    exe_location: "E:/Installs/OpenSSL-Win64/bin/openssl.exe"

etl_temp_share:
  folder_location: "E:/DOH_Shared/"  # File share accessible by SQL Server
  logs_location: "E:/Logs/"

operations_recipients: &operations_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

wlp_eligibility_recipients: &wlp_eligibility_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

email:
  sender: &sender dev_doh@scdhhs.gov
  recipients:
    - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov
#    - NagaSravanthi.Nidumolu@scdhhs.gov
#    - Venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#    - chakradhar.kaitepalli@scdhhs.gov
  env: DEV

# Source.connection.type should be one of ORACLE or SQLSERVER

jobs:
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(Applications, CuramAssessmentQueues, Form1716, FormLTC, ReturnedMail, Reviews,TrailingDocuments) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Applications.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Applications
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CuramAssessmentQueues.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CuramAssessmentQueues
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Form1716.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Form1716
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/FormLTC.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.FormLTC

    module_type: WLP
    source:
