  # SOR Stored procedure execution
  - job_name: SOR_WLP_CREATE_CO
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedure dbo.spWMRequestBatchCreate for Case Ownership view creation in A4P_WLP."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spWMRequestBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WM
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
          include_response_in_email: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      send_sms: true


  - job_name: SOR_WLP_OUTBOUND
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spBatchCreate, dbo.spBatchSend)  for WLP report generation and outbound file creation, including CSV export to SFTP."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchCreate
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchSend
          consider_input_from_previous_sp: true
          params: {
            "BatchId": "0"  # Index position of the previous stored procedure returned result set
          }
          dbname: A4P_WLP
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads"
              remote_dir: "/UPLOAD"
            options:
              format: csv
              delimiter: "|"
              header: true
              filename_format: "ROW[0].csv"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
#            type: network_share
#            connection:
#              path: //$CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH$/WLP/POC/
#              domain: your_domain
#              user: share_user
#              password: share_password
#            options:
#              format: csv
#              delimiter: "|"
#              header: true
#              filename_format: "ROW[0].csv"
#              batch_size: 10000
#              overwrite: true


    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

# ingest WLP Response Files SFTP:
  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_INBOUND_FROM_SFTP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests WLP_DTO response files from SFTP to A4P_WLP SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "WLP_DTO.*.txt.*"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/DOWNLOAD"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "WLPBatchesInbound"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: "|"                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: false
          expected_file_count: 5
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_WLP  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_1_EXTRACT_OBJECT_IDS  #Step 1 - Extract TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts distinct TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file for further processing. Target: CSV file."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: select distinct t.TaskObjectId from dbo.WLPTasks t left join dbo.WLPStatuses s on t.[Status] = s.[StatusName] where isnull(s.[StatusFinal], 0) = 0
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds"
        is_local_download_path: true  # There is an upload to a network share with SMB protocol. Which is not needed for local paths.
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: TaskObjectId_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_2_INGEST_LATEST_STATUS #Step 2, got this OnBase Query from meeting recordings
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests latest status for TaskObjectIds from OnBase_Prod to WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) in A4P_WLP."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON$
        dbname: OnBase_Prod
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: BASIC_AUTH
      tables:
          - query: "select t.objectId TaskOBjectId, wl.attr1652 Worklane, t.attr1687 CaseId, t.attr1654 [Status] 
                    from hsi.rmobjectinstance1057 t
                    left join hsi.rmobjectinstance1053 wl on t.fk1688  = wl.objectid and wl.activestatus = 0 
                    where t.activestatus = 0
                    and t.objectid in (?)"
            consider_input_from_local_csv: true
            local_csv_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds/TaskObjectId_Extract_*.csv"
            target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses
            batch_size: 50
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

    job_type: SOR

      type: SQL_EXEC_SP

        - sp_name: dbo.spGetWLPSystemTaskStatuses

        - sp_name: dbo.spBatchCompleteTasksDeliverOnceStatuses

    destination:

        schema_prefix: dbo

    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "upsert"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/member"
          filename_pattern: "MEDICAR.COVR.*.*"
          cobol_copybook: "./MEMBER/RECIP.MCR.DATES.xml"

          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
#          quote_char = "§"           #change this if § is present in data
#          delimiter_value = "\x1F"   #change this if delimiter is present in data
          primary_key:                #primary key is mandatory for upsert
            - RMD_INDIV_NO
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

# IPP Jobs - Step 1 - Ingesting the Source Data from SFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_LLR_SOURCE_CSV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests LLR files from SFTP to A4P_LLR SQL Server DB."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA$  #DEV SFTP # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/prod"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "LLR_PY"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_LLR  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      send_email_per_file: false
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

# Step 2 - Generating the IPP File to deliver to HHCD103
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_LLR_PFF_FILE
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS) for IPP PFF outbound file creation, including file export to SFTP."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
              remote_dir: "//HHCD103"
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads/mainframe"
              is_mainframe_pff_file_type: true
            options:
              record_format: fb
              logical_record_length: 191
              format: csv
              delimiter: ""
              header: false
              filename_format: "CDIR.NEWPRV"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
              fail_on_zero_records: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

#Step 3: Update Timestamp for delivered records in Audit Table
  - job_name: UPDATE_LLR_TIMESTAMP
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures to update time stamp "
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spSetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS_Delivered
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000

  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.CLMS claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 17, loads into 6 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            doc_type:
              position: 17
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # For CLMS - doc_type only routing, order still matters for clarity
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "B"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- doc_type: "U"          # route 1
              - doc_type: "B"          # route 2
              - doc_type: "A"          # route 3
              - doc_type: "Y"
                tail_ind: "1"          # ← route 4 (WRONG - must be route 1)
              - doc_type: "Y"          # route 5 ← will match Y before tail check ever runs
              - doc_type: "G"          # route 6
              - doc_type: "D"          # route 7

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
routes:
              - doc_type: "Y"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"

              - doc_type: "B"

              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"

routes:
              - doc_type: "Y"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
                # no quote_char/delimiter_value = uses file-level defaults (\x1F and §)

              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"
                quote_char: "\x06"        # ← route-level override
                delimiter_value: "\x0B"   # ← route-level override

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
- job_name: INGEST_VOIDS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.VOIDS file from SFTP, routes by tail_ind at position 39, loads into UB04_BASIC_CLAIM (default) and UZV_VOID_TAIL (tail_ind=1) using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.VOIDS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # Most specific first - tail_ind=1 before default
              - tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
            default:
              cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
              target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000


  - job_name: INGEST_ALLCLMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests CLM2200B.ALLCLMS daily claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 310 and tail_ind at position 332, loads into 9 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "CLM2200B.ALLCLMS.*"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: true
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2553
            doc_type:
              position: 310
            tail_ind:
              position: 332
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # Most specific first - doc_type Y or Z with tail_ind=1 before doc_type only
              - doc_type: "YZ"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZD_DAILY_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZD_DAILY_TAIL"
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY"
              - doc_type: "J"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/BID_BUY_IN_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.BID_BUY_IN_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "B"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DND_DENTAL_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.DND_DENTAL_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HID_HIC_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HID_HIC_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_DAILY_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "Z"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

reference.name: config-dev.yaml
reference.text:
#Azure VAULT URL specific to the environment
azure_vault:
  url: "https://kv-c-d-shrd-doh-01.vault.azure.net/"
  keys: # fetches key vaults upfront so that they cna be referenced in the config values section directly using $KEY$ notation.
    - CS-HTTP-DOWNLOAD-CMS-GOV
    - CS-SQL-SYSDOH
    - CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYS-WLP-CLEMSON
    - CS-SFTP-MMIS
    - CS-FS-945Form
    - CS-Sharepoint
    - CS-SMTP
    - CS-SHAREPOINT-UPLOAD-DTO
    - CS-SFTP-ONBASE
    - CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS
    - CS-DTO-AD
    - CS-ONBASE-CLOUD
    - CS-FILESHARE-ONBASE
    - CS-SQL-SYS-PHOENIX
    - CS-SFTP-TEFRA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA
    - CS-SFTP-AZURE-QA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH
    - CS-SFTP-IBM
    - CS-SFTP-SAS-AD-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-SCEIS

common_tools:
  oracle_instant_client:
    folder_location: "E:/Installs/instantclient_23_7"
  bcp_client:
    exe_location: "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/bcp.exe"
  open_ssl:
    exe_location: "E:/Installs/OpenSSL-Win64/bin/openssl.exe"

etl_temp_share:
  folder_location: "E:/DOH_Shared/"  # File share accessible by SQL Server
  logs_location: "E:/Logs/"

operations_recipients: &operations_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

wlp_eligibility_recipients: &wlp_eligibility_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

email:
  sender: &sender dev_doh@scdhhs.gov
  recipients:
        - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov
    #    - NagaSravanthi.Nidumolu@scdhhs.gov
    #    - Venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
    #    - chakradhar.kaitepalli@scdhhs.gov
  env: DEV

# Source.connection.type should be one of ORACLE or SQLSERVER

jobs:
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(Applications, CuramAssessmentQueues, Form1716, FormLTC, ReturnedMail, Reviews,TrailingDocuments) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Applications.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Applications
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CuramAssessmentQueues.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CuramAssessmentQueues
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Form1716.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Form1716
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/FormLTC.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.FormLTC
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/ReturnedMail.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReturnedMail
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Reviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Reviews
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/TrailingDocuments.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TrailingDocuments
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/users.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Users
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_OnBase
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  #WLP Ingest from OnBase

  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(WLPConfigTeams,WLPConfigWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequences,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces,WLPConfigWorkspaces,WLPReassignmentsByCase) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$     #CS-ONBASE-CLOUD, CS-ONBASE-ClOUD-STAGING
        dbname: OnBase  #OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigTeams.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigTeams
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequences.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequences
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPReassignmentsByCase.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReassignmentsbyCase
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPTasksNotFinished.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPTasksNotFinished
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_COA_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables specific to Case Ownership Assignments workflow(CaseOwnership, CaseOwnershipOrphans) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_WLP database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnership.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnership
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnershipOrphans.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnershipOrphans
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_1
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests CaseParticipantRoles table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB using multi-threading."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.CaseParticipantRoles.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseParticipantRoles
          description: 5.2 million records table need to be ingested in multi-threaded way

    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_2
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingWorkflowTasks table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_3
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests multiple tables (Curam_Member_DOD, PendingApps, PendingAppsSubmitFailed, TimersCGIS, TimersHCR, TimersTD, WorkflowTaskTypes) from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.Curam_Member_DOD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Curam_Member_DOD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingApps.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingApps
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersCGIS.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersCGIS
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersHCR.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersHCR
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersTD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersTD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 15000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_4
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingReviews table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingReviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingReviews
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 150000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: EXTRACT_ELIGIBILITY_CSV_REPORT
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts CTI_DEMO_TARGET table from SSA_Demo SQL Server DB to a CSV file on a network share."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: SSA_Demo
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: //$CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH$/WLP/POC
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: CTI_DEMO_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_PROVIDER
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests MMIS provider file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.PROVIDER.FILE"
          cobol_copybook: "MMIS-PROVIDER.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.MMIS_PROVIDER
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_NPI_JUNCTION
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests NPI junction file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.JUNCT.XWALK"
          cobol_copybook: "NPI-JUNCTION.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NPI_JUNCTION
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestSFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_RSP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests BNET.RSP.FILE from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using JSON configs."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "1048576"
          json_config: "RSP.json"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "BNET.RSP.FILE"
          target_table_name: "RSRI_RSP_INFOMTN"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo

    source:

          target_table_name: "WLPBatchesInbound"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate

          delimiter: "|"                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: false
          expected_file_count: 5
    destination:
      type: database

        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_WLP  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_1_EXTRACT_OBJECT_IDS  #Step 1 - Extract TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts distinct TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file for further processing. Target: CSV file."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: select distinct t.TaskObjectId from dbo.WLPTasks t left join dbo.WLPStatuses s on t.[Status] = s.[StatusName] where isnull(s.[StatusFinal], 0) = 0
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds"
        is_local_download_path: true  # There is an upload to a network share with SMB protocol. Which is not needed for local paths.
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: TaskObjectId_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_2_INGEST_LATEST_STATUS #Step 2, got this OnBase Query from meeting recordings
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests latest status for TaskObjectIds from OnBase_Prod to WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) in A4P_WLP."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON$
        dbname: OnBase_Prod
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: BASIC_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: "select t.objectId TaskOBjectId, wl.attr1652 Worklane, t.attr1687 CaseId, t.attr1654 [Status] 
                    from hsi.rmobjectinstance1057 t
                    left join hsi.rmobjectinstance1053 wl on t.fk1688  = wl.objectid and wl.activestatus = 0 
                    where t.activestatus = 0
                    and t.objectid in (?)"
          consider_input_from_local_csv: true
          local_csv_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds/TaskObjectId_Extract_*.csv"
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses
          batch_size: 50
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

    job_type: SOR

  # IPP Jobs - Step 1 - Ingesting the Source Data from SFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_LLR_SOURCE_CSV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests LLR files from SFTP to A4P_LLR SQL Server DB."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA$  #DEV SFTP # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/prod"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "LLR_PY"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_LLR  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      send_email_per_file: false
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  # Step 2 - Generating the IPP File to deliver to HHCD103
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_LLR_PFF_FILE
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS) for IPP PFF outbound file creation, including file export to SFTP."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
              remote_dir: "//HHCD103"
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads/mainframe"
              is_mainframe_pff_file_type: true
            options:
              record_format: fb
              logical_record_length: 191
              format: csv
              delimiter: ""
              header: false
              filename_format: "CDIR.NEWPRV"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
              fail_on_zero_records: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  #Step 3: Update Timestamp for delivered records in Audit Table
  - job_name: UPDATE_LLR_TIMESTAMP
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures to update time stamp "
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spSetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS_Delivered
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000

  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_PHARMACY_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates LLR Reports need to be sent to Pharmacy Team"

    reports:

    module_type: IPP
    source:

        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_LLR"
        file_format: "xlsx"
        batch_size: 10000
        per_sheet_grid: true  # or false true
        include_counts_in_grid: true
        reporting_query_path: reporting_queries/IPP
        grid_columns:
          - reportName
          - sheetName
          - count
          - sharepointWebUrl
          #- sharepointFolder
    destination:
      type: sharepoint
      connection:
        upload_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/drives/b!gLAXAgcDQUq-0-LKb3WexnWd2RDitqpPt4NdEyKarkbXEpaU82wCQJ1WcwWpg5yg/root:"
        folder_path: /
    options:
      email:

        recipients:

  - job_name: INGEST_DW_MMIS_RJHEALTH
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests RJHEALTH XWALK History file from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB."
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "*ReimbursementCode Xwalk History-CSV Format.zip"      # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/XwalkHistory"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "RJHEALTH"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                       # append or truncate
          use_private_key: "false"
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
          unzip: true
          cleanup_zip_after_unzip: false
          latest_only: true                  # default false
          latest_strategy: name      # remote_mtime | name | local_mtime
          # optional: keep the top N newest (default 1)
          latest_keep_n: 1
          # where to look for date when inner file has none
          file_date_source: auto           # auto | inner | zip_name | parent_folder
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: DW_MMIS # Target database name\
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      send_email_per_file: false

  - job_name: INGEST_BOPSS_PROVIDER_CHECKS_AND_PROVIDER_RECEIVING_CHECKS
    job_type: SOR

    destination:

        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.CLMS claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 17, loads into 6 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            doc_type:
              position: 17
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # For CLMS - doc_type only routing, order still matters for clarity
                - doc_type: "U"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"
                  quote_char: "\x06"
                  delimiter_value: "\x0B"
                - doc_type: "B"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "A"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "Y"
                  tail_ind: "1"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
                - doc_type: "Y"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "G"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "D"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

          target_table_name: dbo.NDC_CLAIM_REC
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_ADO_ADJUST_CLAIM
    job_type: INGEST
    description: >
      Ingests ADO.ADJUST.CLAIM File from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          mode: "truncate"     #other modes - truncate, append
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/Claims"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.ADJS"
          cobol_copybook: "./CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM
          delete_after_process: false
          is_custom_file_name_filter: true
          is_bcp_load_needed: true    #for UPSERT is_bcp_load_needed should always be True
          quote_char: "\x06"           #change this if § is present in data
          delimiter_value: "\x0B"   #change this if delimiter is present in data
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_VOIDS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.VOIDS file from SFTP, routes by tail_ind at position 39, loads into UB04_BASIC_CLAIM (default) and UZV_VOID_TAIL (tail_ind=1) using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.VOIDS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # Most specific first - tail_ind=1 before default
              - tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
            default:
              cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
              target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000


  - job_name: INGEST_ALLCLMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests CLM2200B.ALLCLMS daily claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 310 and tail_ind at position 332, loads into 9 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "CLM2200B.ALLCLMS.*"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: true
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2553
            doc_type:
              position: 310
            tail_ind:
              position: 332
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # Most specific first - doc_type Y or Z with tail_ind=1 before doc_type only
              - doc_type: "YZ"
                tail_ind: "1"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZD_DAILY_TAIL.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZD_DAILY_TAIL"
              - doc_type: "U"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.ADD_ADJUSTMENT_DAILY"
              - doc_type: "J"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/BID_BUY_IN_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.BID_BUY_IN_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "B"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DND_DENTAL_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.DND_DENTAL_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "A"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HID_HIC_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.HID_HIC_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "G"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.NHD_NURSE_HOME_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "D"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY2.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.PHD_PHARMACY_DAILY_2"
              - doc_type: "Y"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_DAILY_CLAIM"
              - doc_type: "Z"
                cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM.xml"
                target_table_name: "dbo.UZ92_DAILY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000



  - job_name: INGEST_RSP_MISSED
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingest Missed Records"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.VOIDS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "append"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 1635
            routes:
            default:
              cobol_copybook: "MEMBER/RSRI_RSP_INFOMTN_AUG2317.xml"
              target_table_name: "dbo.RSRI_RSP_INFOMTN"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

config-dev.yaml.name: config-dev.yaml
config-dev.yaml.value:
#Azure VAULT URL specific to the environment
azure_vault:
  url: "https://kv-c-d-shrd-doh-01.vault.azure.net/"
  keys: # fetches key vaults upfront so that they cna be referenced in the config values section directly using $KEY$ notation.
    - CS-HTTP-DOWNLOAD-CMS-GOV
    - CS-SQL-SYSDOH
    - CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD
    - CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON
    - CS-SQL-SYS-WLP-CLEMSON
    - CS-SFTP-MMIS
    - CS-FS-945Form
    - CS-Sharepoint
    - CS-SMTP
    - CS-SHAREPOINT-UPLOAD-DTO
    - CS-SFTP-ONBASE
    - CS-DTO-SFTP-DSS
    - CS-DTO-AD
    - CS-ONBASE-CLOUD
    - CS-FILESHARE-ONBASE
    - CS-SQL-SYS-PHOENIX
    - CS-SFTP-TEFRA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA
    - CS-SFTP-AZURE-QA
    - CS-SFTP-SCLLR-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH
    - CS-SFTP-IBM
    - CS-SFTP-SAS-AD-PROD
    - CS-SFTP-SCEIS

common_tools:
  oracle_instant_client:
    folder_location: "E:/Installs/instantclient_23_7"
  bcp_client:
    exe_location: "C:/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/bcp.exe"
  open_ssl:
    exe_location: "E:/Installs/OpenSSL-Win64/bin/openssl.exe"

etl_temp_share:
  folder_location: "E:/DOH_Shared/"  # File share accessible by SQL Server
  logs_location: "E:/Logs/"

operations_recipients: &operations_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

wlp_eligibility_recipients: &wlp_eligibility_recipients
#  - venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
#  - ramteja.motupalli@scdhhs.gov

email:
  sender: &sender dev_doh@scdhhs.gov
  recipients:
        - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov
    #    - NagaSravanthi.Nidumolu@scdhhs.gov
    #    - Venkateswarareddy.nakka@scdhhs.gov
    #    - chakradhar.kaitepalli@scdhhs.gov
  env: DEV

# Source.connection.type should be one of ORACLE or SQLSERVER

jobs:
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(Applications, CuramAssessmentQueues, Form1716, FormLTC, ReturnedMail, Reviews,TrailingDocuments) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Applications.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Applications
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CuramAssessmentQueues.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CuramAssessmentQueues
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Form1716.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Form1716
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/FormLTC.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.FormLTC
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/ReturnedMail.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReturnedMail
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/Reviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Reviews
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/TrailingDocuments.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TrailingDocuments
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/users.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Users
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_OnBase
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  #WLP Ingest from OnBase

  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_ONBASE_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables(WLPConfigTeams,WLPConfigWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequences,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes,WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces,WLPConfigWorkspaces,WLPReassignmentsByCase) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_OnBase database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$     #CS-ONBASE-CLOUD, CS-ONBASE-ClOUD-STAGING
        dbname: OnBase  #OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigTeams.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigTeams
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequences.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequences
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorklanes
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkSequenceWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPConfigWorkspaces.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ConfigWorkspaces
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPReassignmentsByCase.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.ReassignmentsbyCase
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/WLPTasksNotFinished.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPTasksNotFinished
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true
  - job_name: INGEST_ONBASE_COA_JOB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Loads all tables specific to Case Ownership Assignments workflow(CaseOwnership, CaseOwnershipOrphans) 
                  from OnBase Clemson DB to A4P_WLP database."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-ONBASE-CLOUD$
        dbname: OnBase
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnership.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnership
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/onbase/CaseOwnershipOrphans.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseOwnershipOrphans
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_1
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests CaseParticipantRoles table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB using multi-threading."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.CaseParticipantRoles.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.CaseParticipantRoles
          description: 5.2 million records table need to be ingested in multi-threaded way

    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_2
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingWorkflowTasks table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingWorkflowTasks
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 200000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_3
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests multiple tables (Curam_Member_DOD, PendingApps, PendingAppsSubmitFailed, TimersCGIS, TimersHCR, TimersTD, WorkflowTaskTypes) from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.Curam_Member_DOD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.Curam_Member_DOD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingApps.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingApps
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingAppsSubmitFailed
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersCGIS.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersCGIS
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersHCR.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersHCR
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.TimersTD.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.TimersTD
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.WorkflowTaskTypes
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 15000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: INGEST_CURAM_JOB_4
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests PendingReviews table from CURAM Oracle DB to A4P_Curam SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: ORACLE
        url: '$CS-SQL-SYSCURAM-CLOUD$'
        dbname: CURAM
      tables:
        - query: $BASE_DIR$/sql_ingest_queries/curam/A4P_Curam.dbo.PendingReviews.sql
          target_table_name: dbo.PendingReviews
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_Curam
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 150000
      overwrite: true
      max_threads: 4

  - job_name: EXTRACT_ELIGIBILITY_CSV_REPORT
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts CTI_DEMO_TARGET table from SSA_Demo SQL Server DB to a CSV file on a network share."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: SSA_Demo
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
        - name: dbo.CTI_DEMO_TARGET
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: //$CS-FILE-SHARE-SYSDOH$/WLP/POC
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: CTI_DEMO_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_PROVIDER
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests MMIS provider file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.PROVIDER.FILE"
          cobol_copybook: "MMIS-PROVIDER.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.MMIS_PROVIDER
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_NPI_JUNCTION
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests NPI junction file from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using COBOL copybook."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/provider"
          filename_pattern: "MMIS.JUNCT.XWALK"
          cobol_copybook: "NPI-JUNCTION.xml"
          target_table_name: dbo.NPI_JUNCTION
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestSFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_RSP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests BNET.RSP.FILE from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using JSON configs."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "1048576"
          json_config: "RSP.json"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "BNET.RSP.FILE"
          target_table_name: "RSRI_RSP_INFOMTN"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: INGEST_MMIS_ELIG
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests BNET.ELIG.FILE from SFTP to A4P_MMIS SQL Server DB using JSON configs."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          file_extension: ""
          buffer_size: "524288"
          json_config: "ELIG.json"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"
          filename_pattern: "BNET.ELIG.FILE"
          target_table_name: "RECIPIENT"
          delete_after_process: false
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000
      overwrite: true

  #ingestFTS  Source DB MedOps.dbo.945_FORM
  - job_name: INGEST_DHECFILE_TO_DB
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DHEC death master file from file share to A4P_Operations SQL Server DB using JSON config."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: FTS
      connection:
        path: $CS-FS-945Form$
        domain: your_domain
        user: share_user
        password: share_password
        file_extension: "dth"
        json_config: "DHECConfig.json"
        table_name: "DeathMasterFile_DHEC"
        mode: append
        filter_column: "FileDate"
      options:

    options:

  # ingest WLP Response Files SFTP:
  - job_name: INGEST_WLP_INBOUND_FROM_SFTP
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests WLP_DTO response files from SFTP to A4P_WLP SQL Server DB."
    module_type: WLP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-ONBASE$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port

        - filename_pattern: "WLP_DTO.*.txt.*"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files

          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "WLPBatchesInbound"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: "|"                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: false
          expected_file_count: 5
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_WLP  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_1_EXTRACT_OBJECT_IDS  #Step 1 - Extract TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file
    job_type: EXTRACT
    description: "Extracts distinct TaskObjectIds from WLPTasks table to a CSV file for further processing. Target: CSV file."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: select distinct t.TaskObjectId from dbo.WLPTasks t left join dbo.WLPStatuses s on t.[Status] = s.[StatusName] where isnull(s.[StatusFinal], 0) = 0
    destination:
      type: network_share
      connection:
        path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds"
        is_local_download_path: true  # There is an upload to a network share with SMB protocol. Which is not needed for local paths.
    options:
      format: csv
      delimiter: ","
      header: true
      filename_format: TaskObjectId_Extract_%Y-%m-%d_%H%M_random().csv
      batch_size: 10000
      overwrite: true

  - job_name: WLP_TASK_2_INGEST_LATEST_STATUS #Step 2, got this OnBase Query from meeting recordings
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests latest status for TaskObjectIds from OnBase_Prod to WLPSystemTaskStatuses (target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses) in A4P_WLP."
    source:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSONBASE-CLEMSON$
        dbname: OnBase_Prod
        schema_prefix: hsi
        auth: BASIC_AUTH
      tables:
        - query: "select t.objectId TaskOBjectId, wl.attr1652 Worklane, t.attr1687 CaseId, t.attr1654 [Status] 
                    from hsi.rmobjectinstance1057 t
                    left join hsi.rmobjectinstance1053 wl on t.fk1688  = wl.objectid and wl.activestatus = 0 
                    where t.activestatus = 0
                    and t.objectid in (?)"
          consider_input_from_local_csv: true
          local_csv_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/WLPTasks/TaskObjectIds/TaskObjectId_Extract_*.csv"
          target_table_name: dbo.WLPSystemTaskStatuses
          batch_size: 50
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_WLP
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 50000

    job_type: SOR

  # IPP Jobs - Step 1 - Ingesting the Source Data from SFTP
  - job_name: INGEST_LLR_SOURCE_CSV
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests LLR files from SFTP to A4P_LLR SQL Server DB."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-SCLLR-QA$  #DEV SFTP # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "CDHHSExport_*.csv"         # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/prod"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "LLR_PY"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                           # append or truncate
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","                              # NEW � specify delimiter for this file
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: A4P_LLR  # Target database name
    options:
      batch_size: 1000
      send_email_per_file: false
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  # Step 2 - Generating the IPP File to deliver to HHCD103
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_LLR_PFF_FILE
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures(dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS) for IPP PFF outbound file creation, including file export to SFTP."
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spGetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          generate_csv_report: true
          destination:
            type: sftp_write
            connection:
              url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
              remote_dir: "//HHCD103"
              local_file_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/uploads/mainframe"
              is_mainframe_pff_file_type: true
            options:
              record_format: fb
              logical_record_length: 191
              format: csv
              delimiter: ""
              header: false
              filename_format: "CDIR.NEWPRV"
              batch_size: 10000
              overwrite: true
              fail_on_zero_records: true
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      email:
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  #Step 3: Update Timestamp for delivered records in Audit Table
  - job_name: UPDATE_LLR_TIMESTAMP
    job_type: SOR
    description: "Executes stored procedures to update time stamp "
    module_name: IPP
    source:
      type: SQL_EXEC_SP
      sp_names:
        - sp_name: dbo.spSetLLR_PY_TO_MMIS_Delivered
          dbname: A4P_LLR
          execute_at: "6:00 AM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: A4P_LLR
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 10000

  #Step 4: Generating Pharmacy Reports and devliver to Sharepoint
  - job_name: EXTRACT_IPP_PHARMACY_REPORT
    job_type: REPORTS
    description: "Generates LLR Reports need to be sent to Pharmacy Team"
    module_name: IPP
    reports:

    module_type: IPP
    source:

      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        database: "A4P_LLR"
        file_format: "xlsx"
        batch_size: 10000
        per_sheet_grid: true  # or false true
        include_counts_in_grid: true
        reporting_query_path: reporting_queries/IPP
        grid_columns:
          - reportName
          - sheetName
          - count
          - sharepointWebUrl
          #- sharepointFolder
    destination:
      type: sharepoint
      connection:
        upload_url: "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/drives/b!gLAXAgcDQUq-0-LKb3WexnWd2RDitqpPt4NdEyKarkbXEpaU82wCQJ1WcwWpg5yg/root:"
        folder_path: /
    options:
      email:
        sender: *sender
        recipients:
          - ArunKumar.Nimmoju@scdhhs.gov

  - job_name: INGEST_DW_MMIS_RJHEALTH
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests RJHEALTH XWALK History file from SFTP to DW_MMIS SQL Server DB."
    source:
      type: SFTPCSV
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-RJHEALTH$  # Azure Key Vault entry, format: sftp://user:pass@host:port
      files:
        - filename_pattern: "*ReimbursementCode Xwalk History-CSV Format.zip"      # Wildcard for timestamped CSV files
          remote_path: "/XwalkHistory"       # Remote SFTP folder path
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads"   # Local temp folder
          target_table_name: "RJHEALTH"    # SQL Server table name
          mode: "append"                       # append or truncate
          use_private_key: "false"
          delete_after_download: false              # optional deletion
          delimiter: ","
          has_header: true
          expected_file_count: 1
          sftp_retry_attempts: 3
          sftp_retry_interval_seconds: 30
          unzip: true
          cleanup_zip_after_unzip: false
          latest_only: true                  # default false
          latest_strategy: name      # remote_mtime | name | local_mtime
          # optional: keep the top N newest (default 1)
          latest_keep_n: 1
          # where to look for date when inner file has none
          file_date_source: auto           # auto | inner | zip_name | parent_folder
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$     # SQL Server connection string (from Azure Key Vault)
        dbname: DW_MMIS # Target database name\
    options:
      batch_size: 10000
      send_email_per_file: false

        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000

  - job_name: INGEST_CLAIMS
    job_type: INGEST
    description: "Ingests DSU0059.CLMS claims file from SFTP, routes by doc_type at position 17, loads into 6 tables using respective COBOL copybooks"
    module_type: CLAIMS
    source:
      type: SFTP
      connection:
        url: $CS-SFTP-MMIS$
      files:
        - remote_path: "//HHCD103"
          filename_pattern: "DSU0059.CLMS"
          buffer_size: "524288"
          local_download_path: "E:/DOH_Shared/sftp/downloads/claims"
          delete_after_process: false
          is_bcp_load_needed: true
          mode: "truncate"
          get_matching_file: false
          combined_file_routing:
            lrecl: 2265
            doc_type:
              position: 17
            tail_ind:
              position: 39
              true_values: ["1"]
            routes:
              # For CLMS - doc_type only routing, order still matters for clarity
                - doc_type: "U"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.ADO_ADJUSTMENT_CLAIM"
                  quote_char: "\x06"
                  delimiter_value: "\x0B"
                - doc_type: "B"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.DNO_DENTAL_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "A"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/HIO_HIC_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.HIO_HIC_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "Y"
                  tail_ind: "1"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UZV_VOID_TAIL.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.UZV_VOID_TAIL"
                - doc_type: "Y"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/UB04_BASIC_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.UB04_BASIC_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "G"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.NHO_NURSE_HOME_CLAIM"
                - doc_type: "D"
                  cobol_copybook: "CLAIMS/PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM.xml"
                  target_table_name: "dbo.PHO_PHARMACY_CLAIM"
    destination:
      type: database
      connection:
        type: SQLSERVER
        url: $CS-SQL-SYSDOH$
        dbname: DW_MMIS
        schema_prefix: dbo
        auth: WINDOWS_AUTH
    options:
      batch_size: 100000
